page_blocks.web_template_values: {"title":"Discover Egypt with Confidence","description":"Explore the timeless beauty of Egypt with Guarantee Tours. your trusted partner for unforgettable journeys across ancient landmarks and vibrant destinations. From the Pyramids of Giza to Luxor and the Red Sea, we provide expertly planned tours, professional guides, and smooth travel experiences focused on comfort and discovery.","cover_image":"/private/files/cairoa81389.jpg","image_alt":"Cairo Egypt Tours","first_button_label":"Get In Touch","first_button_url":"/contact","second_button_label":"Read Blog","second_button_url":"/blog","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Descoperă Egiptul cu Încredere"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Explorează frumusețea atemporală a Egiptului cu Guarantee Tours, partenerul tău de încredere pentru călătorii de neuitat prin monumente antice și destinații vibrante. De la Piramidele din Giza la Luxor și Marea Roșie, oferim tururi planificate expert, ghizi profesioniști și experiențe de călătorie fluide, axate pe confort și descoperire."},{"field":"cover_image","translated_value":"/private/files/cairoa81389.jpg"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Tururi în Cairo, Egipt"},{"field":"first_button_label","translated_value":"Contactați-ne"},{"field":"first_button_url","translated_value":"/contact"},{"field":"second_button_label","translated_value":"Citiți Blogul"},{"field":"second_button_url","translated_value":"/blog"}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Откройте Египет с уверенностью"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Исследуйте вечную красоту Египта с Guarantee Tours, вашим надежным партнером для незабываемых путешествий по древним достопримечательностям и оживленным городам. От пирамид Гизы до Луксора и Красного моря, мы предлагаем туры, спланированные экспертами, профессиональных гидов и комфортные путешествия, ориентированные на комфорт и открытия."},{"field":"cover_image","translated_value":"/private/files/cairoa81389.jpg"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Туры по Каиру, Египет"},{"field":"first_button_label","translated_value":"Свяжитесь с нами"},{"field":"first_button_url","translated_value":"/contact"},{"field":"second_button_label","translated_value":"Читать блог"},{"field":"second_button_url","translated_value":"/blog"}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Entdecken Sie Ägypten mit Zuversicht"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Erkunden Sie die zeitlose Schönheit Ägyptens mit Guarantee Tours, Ihrem vertrauenswürdigen Partner für unvergessliche Reisen zu antiken Wahrzeichen und pulsierenden Zielen. Von den Pyramiden von Gizeh bis nach Luxor und ans Rote Meer bieten wir fachmännisch geplante Touren, professionelle Reiseleiter und reibungslose Reiseerlebnisse mit Fokus auf Komfort und Entdeckung."},{"field":"cover_image","translated_value":"/private/files/cairoa81389.jpg"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Kairo Ägypten Touren"},{"field":"first_button_label","translated_value":"Kontakt aufnehmen"},{"field":"first_button_url","translated_value":"/contact"},{"field":"second_button_label","translated_value":"Blog lesen"},{"field":"second_button_url","translated_value":"/blog"}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Discover Egypt with Confidence"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Explore the timeless beauty of Egypt with Guarantee Tours. your trusted partner for unforgettable journeys across ancient landmarks and vibrant destinations. From the Pyramids of Giza to Luxor and the Red Sea, we provide expertly planned tours, professional guides, and smooth travel experiences focused on comfort and discovery."},{"field":"cover_image","translated_value":"/private/files/cairoa81389.jpg"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Cairo Egypt Tours"},{"field":"first_button_label","translated_value":"Get In Touch"},{"field":"first_button_url","translated_value":"/contact"},{"field":"second_button_label","translated_value":"Read Blog"},{"field":"second_button_url","translated_value":"/blog"}]}}

{"title":" About Guarantee Tours ","description":" Guarantee Tours is a dedicated Egyptian travel company focused on delivering exceptional tour experiences across the country. We combine deep local knowledge with professional service to create journeys that are enriching, smooth, and memorable. Whether you’re seeking history, adventure, relaxation, or culture, our curated tour packages are designed to suit every traveler’s style and schedule\n\n","image":"/private/files/about.png","pullets":[{"idx":1,"__islocal":true,"pullet_point":"Expertly designed tours covering all major Egyptian destinations","name":"95snhcpt"},{"idx":2,"__islocal":true,"pullet_point":"Licensed, multilingual tour guides with deep historical knowledge","name":"d1jdu23m"},{"idx":3,"__islocal":true,"pullet_point":"Flexible packages for individuals, families, and groups","name":"g3b0c3kp"},{"idx":4,"__islocal":true,"pullet_point":"Comfortable transportation and trusted hotel partnerships","name":"k7b2ida6"}],"translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Despre Guarantee Tours"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours este o companie de turism egipteană dedicată, axată pe oferirea unor experiențe turistice excepționale în întreaga țară. Combinăm cunoștințe locale profunde cu servicii profesionale pentru a crea călătorii îmbogățitoare, line și memorabile. Fie că sunteți în căutarea istoriei, aventurii, relaxării sau culturii, pachetele noastre turistice atent selecționate sunt concepute pentru a se potrivi stilului și programului fiecărui călător."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"О Guarantee Tours"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours — это специализированная египетская туристическая компания, ориентированная на предоставление исключительных туристических впечатлений по всей стране. Мы сочетаем глубокие местные знания с профессиональным обслуживанием, чтобы создавать обогащающие, беспроблемные и запоминающиеся путешествия. Ищете ли вы историю, приключения, отдых или культуру, наши тщательно подобранные туристические пакеты разработаны с учетом стиля и расписания каждого путешественника."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Über Guarantee Tours"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours ist ein engagiertes ägyptisches Reiseunternehmen, das sich auf die Bereitstellung außergewöhnlicher Tourenerlebnisse im ganzen Land konzentriert. Wir kombinieren tiefes lokales Wissen mit professionellem Service, um bereichernde, reibungslose und unvergessliche Reisen zu schaffen. Egal, ob Sie auf der Suche nach Geschichte, Abenteuer, Entspannung oder Kultur sind, unsere kuratierten Tourpakete sind darauf ausgelegt, jedem Reisetyp und Zeitplan gerecht zu werden."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"About Guarantee Tours"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours is a dedicated Egyptian travel company focused on delivering exceptional tour experiences across the country. We combine deep local knowledge with professional service to create journeys that are enriching, smooth, and memorable. Whether you’re seeking history, adventure, relaxation, or culture, our curated tour packages are designed to suit every traveler’s style and schedule"},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"}]}}

{"title":"Explore Egypt’s Top Destinations","description":"Discover the most iconic cities across Egypt, each offering a unique blend of history, culture, and natural beauty. From ancient temples and historic streets to coastal escapes and desert adventures, choose your next destination and let us craft the perfect tour experience for you","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Explorați Destinațiile de Top din Egipt"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Descoperiți cele mai iconice orașe din Egipt, fiecare oferind un amestec unic de istorie, cultură și frumusețe naturală. De la temple antice și străzi istorice, la evadări pe coastă și aventuri în deșert, alegeți următoarea destinație și lăsați-ne să creăm experiența perfectă de tur pentru dumneavoastră."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Исследуйте главные направления Египта"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Откройте для себя самые знаковые города Египта, каждый из которых предлагает уникальное сочетание истории, культуры и природной красоты. От древних храмов и исторических улиц до прибрежных курортов и пустынных приключений — выберите следующее направление, и мы создадим для вас идеальное туристическое путешествие."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Entdecken Sie Ägyptens Top-Reiseziele"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Entdecken Sie die ikonischsten Städte Ägyptens, die jeweils eine einzigartige Mischung aus Geschichte, Kultur und natürlicher Schönheit bieten. Von antiken Tempeln und historischen Straßen bis hin zu Küstenfluchten und Wüstenabenteuern – wählen Sie Ihr nächstes Reiseziel und lassen Sie uns das perfekte Tourerlebnis für Sie gestalten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Explore Egypt’s Top Destinations"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Discover the most iconic cities across Egypt, each offering a unique blend of history, culture, and natural beauty. From ancient temples and historic streets to coastal escapes and desert adventures, choose your next destination and let us craft the perfect tour experience for you"}]}}

{"title":"Testemonials","columns":"3","testimonials":[{"idx":1,"__islocal":true,"content":"Everything  was  perfectly  organized  from  pickup  to  drop-off.  The  Ras  Mohamed  boat  trip  was  the  highlight  of  our  vacation  —  professional  crew  and  unforgettable  snorkeling  spots.  ","full_name":"Daniel Foster","designation":"Traveler from UK","image":"/private/files/photo-1535713875002-d1d0cf377fde.jpg","name":"45a2nvil"}]}

{"subtitle":" Proven Travel Coverage Across Egypt ","title":" +500 Successful Trips Delivered ","description":"Guarantee Tours has organized trips across Egypt’s most iconic destinations\nfrom Cairo and Luxor to Aswan, Sinai, and the Red Sea coast. Our growing network of routes and highlighted destinations on the map reflects real journeys completed and memorable experiences delivered to travelers from around the world.\n","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"subtitle","translated_value":"Acoperire de Călătorie Dovedită în Egipt"},{"field":"title","translated_value":"+500 Călătorii de Succes Livrate"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours a organizat excursii în cele mai iconice destinații ale Egiptului, de la Cairo și Luxor la Aswan, Sinai și coasta Mării Roșii. Rețeaua noastră în creștere de rute și destinații evidențiate pe hartă reflectă călătorii reale finalizate și experiențe memorabile oferite călătorilor din întreaga lume."}],"RU":[{"field":"subtitle","translated_value":"Проверенное туристическое покрытие по всему Египту"},{"field":"title","translated_value":"+500 Успешно организованных туров"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours организует туры по самым знаковым направлениям Египта: от Каира и Луксора до Асуана, Синая и побережья Красного моря. Наша растущая сеть маршрутов и выделенных на карте направлений отражает реальные завершенные путешествия и незабываемые впечатления, доставленные путешественникам со всего мира."}],"DE":[{"field":"subtitle","translated_value":"Nachgewiesene Reiseabdeckung in ganz Ägypten"},{"field":"title","translated_value":"+500 Erfolgreich durchgeführte Reisen"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours hat Reisen zu den ikonischsten Reisezielen Ägyptens organisiert, von Kairo und Luxor bis nach Assuan, Sinai und an die Küste des Roten Meeres. Unser wachsendes Netzwerk von Routen und auf der Karte hervorgehobenen Zielen spiegelt tatsächlich abgeschlossene Reisen und unvergessliche Erlebnisse wider, die Reisenden aus aller Welt geboten wurden."}],"EN":[{"field":"subtitle","translated_value":"Proven Travel Coverage Across Egypt"},{"field":"title","translated_value":"+500 Successful Trips Delivered"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours has organized trips across Egypt’s most iconic destinations from Cairo and Luxor to Aswan, Sinai, and the Red Sea coast. Our growing network of routes and highlighted destinations on the map reflects real journeys completed and memorable experiences delivered to travelers from around the world."}]}}

{"title":"Featured Trips Across Egypt","description":"Browse our carefully selected trips designed to showcase the best of Egypt — from ancient wonders and cultural landmarks to seaside escapes and desert adventures. Each trip is professionally organized to give you a smooth, memorable, and enriching travel experience.","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Călătorii Recomandate în Egipt"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Răsfoiți selecția noastră atentă de călătorii, concepute pentru a prezenta tot ce are mai bun Egiptul — de la minuni antice și monumente culturale, la evadări pe malul mării și aventuri în deșert. Fiecare călătorie este organizată profesional pentru a vă oferi o experiență de călătorie fluidă, memorabilă și îmbogățitoare."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Рекомендуемые туры по Египту"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Ознакомьтесь с нашими тщательно отобранными турами, разработанными для демонстрации всего лучшего, что может предложить Египет — от древних чудес и культурных достопримечательностей до приморских курортов и пустынных приключений. Каждый тур профессионально организован, чтобы обеспечить вам комфортное, запоминающееся и познавательное путешествие."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Besondere Reisen durch Ägypten"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Stöbern Sie durch unsere sorgfältig ausgewählten Reisen, die darauf ausgelegt sind, das Beste Ägyptens zu präsentieren – von antiken Wundern und kulturellen Sehenswürdigkeiten bis hin zu Küstenfluchten und Wüstenabenteuern. Jede Reise ist professionell organisiert, um Ihnen ein reibungsloses, unvergessliches und bereicherndes Reiseerlebnis zu bieten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Featured Trips Across Egypt"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Browse our carefully selected trips designed to showcase the best of Egypt — from ancient wonders and cultural landmarks to seaside escapes and desert adventures. Each trip is professionally organized to give you a smooth, memorable, and enriching travel experience."}]}}

{"title":"From the Blog","description":"from ancient wonders and cultural landmarks to seaside escapes and desert adventures. Each trip is professionally organized to give you a smooth, memorable, and enriching travel experience.","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"De pe blog"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"de la minuni antice și monumente culturale la evadări pe litoral și aventuri în deșert. Fiecare călătorie este organizată profesional pentru a vă oferi o experiență de călătorie lină, memorabilă și îmbogățitoare."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Из блога"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"от древних чудес и культурных достопримечательностей до приморских курортов и пустынных приключений. Каждая поездка профессионально организована, чтобы обеспечить вам плавное, запоминающееся и обогащающее путешествие."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Aus dem Blog"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"von antiken Wundern und Kulturdenkmälern bis hin zu Küstenfluchten und Wüstenabenteuern. Jede Reise ist professionell organisiert, um Ihnen ein reibungsloses, unvergessliches und bereicherndes Reiseerlebnis zu bieten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"From the Blog"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"from ancient wonders and cultural landmarks to seaside escapes and desert adventures. Each trip is professionally organized to give you a smooth, memorable, and enriching travel experience."}]}}

{"title":" Trusted by Leading Travel & Hospitality Partners ","description":" We proudly collaborate with trusted hotels, transport providers, activity operators, and tourism organizations across Egypt to deliver safe, comfortable, and memorable travel experiences. Our partner network helps us ensure consistent quality across every trip. ","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"De încredere pentru Parteneri de Top din Turism și Ospitalitate"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Colaborăm cu mândrie cu hoteluri de încredere, furnizori de transport, operatori de activități și organizații turistice din Egipt pentru a oferi experiențe de călătorie sigure, confortabile și memorabile. Rețeaua noastră de parteneri ne ajută să asigurăm o calitate constantă pe parcursul fiecărei călătorii."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Нам доверяют ведущие партнеры в сфере туризма и гостеприимства"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Мы с гордостью сотрудничаем с проверенными отелями, транспортными компаниями, организаторами мероприятий и туристическими организациями по всему Египту, чтобы обеспечить безопасные, комфортные и незабываемые впечатления от путешествий. Наша сеть партнеров помогает нам гарантировать стабильное качество каждой поездки."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Vertraut von führenden Partnern aus Reise & Gastgewerbe"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Wir arbeiten stolz mit vertrauenswürdigen Hotels, Transportanbietern, Aktivitätsveranstaltern und Tourismusorganisationen in ganz Ägypten zusammen, um sichere, komfortable und unvergessliche Reiseerlebnisse zu bieten. Unser Partnernetzwerk hilft uns, eine gleichbleibende Qualität bei jeder Reise zu gewährleisten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Trusted by Leading Travel & Hospitality Partners"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"We proudly collaborate with trusted hotels, transport providers, activity operators, and tourism organizations across Egypt to deliver safe, comfortable, and memorable travel experiences. Our partner network helps us ensure consistent quality across every trip."}]}}

{"title":"Who We Are","description":"Guarantee Tours is a leading Egyptian travel company dedicated to creating unforgettable journeys across Egypt's most iconic destinations. With years of experience and a passion for authentic travel, we bring you closer to Egypt's history, culture, and natural beauty.","image":"/private/files/about.png","image_alt":"About Guarantee Tours","items":[{"idx":1,"__islocal":true,"icon":"📍","item_title":"Our Location","item_brief":"Cairo, Egypt — operating across all major Egyptian destinations","name":"item_location"},{"idx":2,"__islocal":true,"icon":"📞","item_title":"Phone","item_brief":"+20 100 000 0000","name":"item_phone"},{"idx":3,"__islocal":true,"icon":"✉️","item_title":"Email","item_brief":"info@guaranteetours.com","name":"item_email"},{"idx":4,"__islocal":true,"icon":"🕐","item_title":"Working Hours","item_brief":"Saturday – Thursday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM","name":"item_hours"}],"translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Cine suntem"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours este o companie egipteană de turism de renume, dedicată creării de călătorii de neuitat în cele mai emblematice destinații ale Egiptului. Cu ani de experiență și o pasiune pentru călătoriile autentice, vă aducem mai aproape de istoria, cultura și frumusețea naturală a Egiptului."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Despre Guarantee Tours"}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"О нас"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours — ведущая египетская туристическая компания, специализирующаяся на создании незабываемых путешествий по самым знаковым местам Египта. Обладая многолетним опытом и страстью к аутентичным путешествиям, мы приблизим вас к истории, культуре и природной красоте Египта."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"О Guarantee Tours"}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Wer wir sind"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours ist ein führendes ägyptisches Reiseunternehmen, das sich der Schaffung unvergesslicher Reisen zu den ikonischsten Reisezielen Ägyptens verschrieben hat. Mit jahrelanger Erfahrung und einer Leidenschaft für authentisches Reisen bringen wir Sie der Geschichte, Kultur und natürlichen Schönheit Ägyptens näher."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"Über Guarantee Tours"}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Who We Are"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Guarantee Tours is a leading Egyptian travel company dedicated to creating unforgettable journeys across Egypt's most iconic destinations. With years of experience and a passion for authentic travel, we bring you closer to Egypt's history, culture, and natural beauty."},{"field":"image","translated_value":"/private/files/about.png"},{"field":"image_alt","translated_value":"About Guarantee Tours"}]}}

{"title":"Meet Our Team","brief":"Behind every great journey is a dedicated team. Our travel experts, guides, and coordinators work together to make your Egyptian adventure smooth, safe, and truly memorable.","members":[{"idx":1,"__islocal":true,"image":"","name":"Ahmed Hassan","member_title":"CEO & Founder","description":"With over 15 years in Egyptian tourism, Ahmed leads the company with a passion for authentic travel experiences and exceptional customer service.","email":"ahmed@guaranteetours.com"},{"idx":2,"__islocal":true,"image":"","name":"Sara Mahmoud","member_title":"Head of Operations","description":"Sara ensures every tour runs flawlessly, coordinating logistics, guides, and accommodations across all destinations.","email":"sara@guaranteetours.com"},{"idx":3,"__islocal":true,"image":"","name":"Karim Nasser","member_title":"Senior Tour Guide","description":"A certified Egyptologist and multilingual guide, Karim brings history to life with deep knowledge and engaging storytelling.","email":"karim@guaranteetours.com"}],"translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Întâlnește-ne Echipa"},{"field":"brief","translated_value":"În spatele fiecărei mari călătorii stă o echipă dedicată. Experții noștri în turism, ghizii și coordonatorii lucrează împreună pentru a face aventura ta egipteană lină, sigură și cu adevărat memorabilă."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Познакомьтесь с нашей командой"},{"field":"brief","translated_value":"За каждым великим путешествием стоит преданная команда. Наши эксперты по путешествиям, гиды и координаторы работают вместе, чтобы ваше египетское приключение было гладким, безопасным и поистине незабываемым."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Lernen Sie unser Team kennen"},{"field":"brief","translated_value":"Hinter jeder großartigen Reise steht ein engagiertes Team. Unsere Reiseexperten, Guides und Koordinatoren arbeiten zusammen, um Ihr ägyptisches Abenteuer reibungslos, sicher und unvergesslich zu gestalten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Meet Our Team"},{"field":"brief","translated_value":"Behind every great journey is a dedicated team. Our travel experts, guides, and coordinators work together to make your Egyptian adventure smooth, safe, and truly memorable."}]}}

{"title":"Trusted by Leading Travel & Hospitality Partners","description":"We proudly collaborate with trusted hotels, transport providers, activity operators, and tourism organizations across Egypt to deliver safe, comfortable, and memorable travel experiences. Our partner network helps us ensure consistent quality across every trip.","translations":{"ROM":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"De încredere de către partenerii de top din domeniul turismului și ospitalității"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Colaborăm cu mândrie cu hoteluri de încredere, furnizori de transport, operatori de activități și organizații turistice din Egipt pentru a oferi experiențe de călătorie sigure, confortabile și memorabile. Rețeaua noastră de parteneri ne ajută să asigurăm o calitate constantă pe parcursul fiecărei călătorii."}],"RU":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Нам доверяют ведущие партнеры в сфере туризма и гостеприимства"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Мы с гордостью сотрудничаем с надежными отелями, транспортными компаниями, организаторами мероприятий и туристическими организациями по всему Египту, чтобы обеспечить безопасные, комфортные и незабываемые впечатления от путешествий. Наша партнерская сеть помогает нам обеспечивать стабильное качество каждой поездки."}],"DE":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Vertraut von führenden Partnern aus den Bereichen Reisen & Gastgewerbe"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"Wir arbeiten stolz mit vertrauenswürdigen Hotels, Transportanbietern, Aktivitätsveranstaltern und Tourismusorganisationen in ganz Ägypten zusammen, um sichere, komfortable und unvergessliche Reiseerlebnisse zu bieten. Unser Partnernetzwerk hilft uns, eine gleichbleibende Qualität bei jeder Reise zu gewährleisten."}],"EN":[{"field":"title","translated_value":"Trusted by Leading Travel & Hospitality Partners"},{"field":"description","translated_value":"We proudly collaborate with trusted hotels, transport providers, activity operators, and tourism organizations across Egypt to deliver safe, comfortable, and memorable travel experiences. Our partner network helps us ensure consistent quality across every trip."}]}}

{"title":"Get in Touch","brief":"Reach out to us for project inquiries, partnerships, or just to say hello.","items":[{"idx":1,"__islocal":true,"icon":"📍","label":"Address","value":"King Abdullah Rd, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia","name":"item_address"},{"idx":2,"__islocal":true,"icon":"📞","label":"Phone","value":"+966 59 6888 111","name":"item_phone"},{"idx":3,"__islocal":true,"icon":"✉️","label":"Email","value":"info@gulfelite.sa","name":"item_email"}],"map_embed":""}
